water_sewer_trash.label: Water & Sewer
water_sewer_trash.subtitle: Water, Sewer & Trash Collection CPI
water_sewer_trash.description: CPI for water, sewer, and trash collection services, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted. No state-level water-rate data exists from a public source (the AWWA rate survey is proprietary), so this national index is the defensible measure.

gas.label: Gasoline
gas.subtitle: Regular Unleaded, US Average
gas.description: Weekly retail price of regular unleaded gasoline, averaged across all US regions. Published by the EIA.

electricity.label: Electricity
electricity.subtitle: Electricity CPI
electricity.description: CPI for electricity, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted.

groceries.label: Groceries
groceries.subtitle: Food at Home CPI (All Groceries)
groceries.description: CPI for all urban consumers: food at home. The aggregate index the individual grocery items below feed into.

eggs.label: Eggs
eggs.subtitle: Grade A, Large, per Dozen
eggs.description: Average retail price of Grade A large eggs in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

ground_beef.label: Ground Beef
ground_beef.subtitle: 100% Beef, per Pound
ground_beef.description: Average retail price of 100% ground beef in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

chicken_breast.label: Chicken Breast
chicken_breast.subtitle: Boneless, per Pound
chicken_breast.description: Average retail price of boneless chicken breast in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

milk.label: Milk
milk.subtitle: Whole, Fortified, per Gallon
milk.description: Average retail price of fresh whole fortified milk in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

bread.label: Bread
bread.subtitle: White, Pan, per Pound
bread.description: Average retail price of white pan bread in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

bananas.label: Bananas
bananas.subtitle: per Pound
bananas.description: Average retail price of bananas in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

potatoes.label: Potatoes
potatoes.subtitle: White, per Pound
potatoes.description: Average retail price of white potatoes in U.S. city averages, from the BLS Average Price data.

car_insurance.label: Car Insurance
car_insurance.subtitle: Motor Vehicle Insurance CPI
car_insurance.description: CPI for motor vehicle insurance, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted (fetched via the BLS API; FRED carries only the NSA version).

new_cars.label: New Cars
new_cars.subtitle: New Vehicles CPI
new_cars.description: CPI for new vehicles, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted.

used_cars.label: Used Cars
used_cars.subtitle: Used Cars and Trucks CPI
used_cars.description: CPI for used cars and trucks, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted.

health_insurance.label: Health Insurance
health_insurance.subtitle: Health Insurance CPI
health_insurance.description: CPI for health insurance, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted (fetched via the BLS API). Captures the cost of insurance retained by insurers (administrative costs, profit), not total medical care.

childcare.label: Childcare
childcare.subtitle: Day Care and Preschool CPI
childcare.description: CPI for day care and preschool services, all urban consumers, seasonally adjusted (fetched via the BLS API).

rent.label: Rent (CPI)
rent.subtitle: Rent of Primary Residence CPI
rent.description: CPI for rent of primary residence, all urban consumers, not seasonally adjusted. Tracks rents paid by all tenants, including long-standing leases.

zori_rent.label: Rent (Market)
zori_rent.subtitle: Zillow Observed Rent Index, US
zori_rent.description: Typical market-rate asking rent (smoothed, seasonally adjusted), all homes and apartments. Zillow Observed Rent Index. Unlike CPI rent, this tracks what a new lease costs today, in dollars.
zori_rent.source_note: Zillow Observed Rent Index (ZORI), smoothed & seasonally adjusted

median_home_price.label: Median Home Price
median_home_price.subtitle: Median Sales Price, Houses Sold (US)
median_home_price.description: Median sales price of houses sold in the United States. Quarterly, from the Census Bureau / HUD.

mortgage.label: 30-Year Mortgage
mortgage.subtitle: Freddie Mac Weekly Survey
mortgage.description: Average 30-year fixed-rate mortgage as reported in the Freddie Mac Primary Mortgage Market Survey.

aca_benchmark_premium.label: ACA Benchmark Premium
aca_benchmark_premium.subtitle: Second-Lowest-Cost Silver, Age 40
aca_benchmark_premium.description: Average benchmark premium — the second-lowest-cost silver Marketplace plan for a 40-year-old, the plan used to set ACA premium subsidies. KFF analysis of Healthcare.gov and state rate filings.
aca_benchmark_premium.source_note: KFF State Health Facts, Average Marketplace Premiums by Metal Tier (annual)

uninsured_rate.label: Uninsured Rate
uninsured_rate.subtitle: Share of Population Without Coverage
uninsured_rate.description: Share of the total population with no health insurance coverage. KFF State Health Facts, Health Insurance Coverage of the Total Population (KFF estimates from the Census ACS). No data for 2020, which the ACS did not release on a comparable basis.
uninsured_rate.source_note: KFF State Health Facts, Health Insurance Coverage of the Total Population (annual)

rent_burden.label: Rent Burden
rent_burden.subtitle: Renters Paying 30%+ of Income
rent_burden.description: Share of renter households spending 30 percent or more of household income on gross rent — the standard cost-burden threshold. Census ACS 1-year estimates, table B25070 (households where the ratio is not computed are excluded). No 2020 data (no standard ACS release).

unemployment.label: Unemployment Rate
unemployment.subtitle: US Civilian Unemployment
unemployment.description: Percent of the labor force that is unemployed and actively seeking work. Monthly, seasonally adjusted.

hourly_earnings.label: Hourly Earnings
hourly_earnings.subtitle: Average, All Private Employees
hourly_earnings.description: Average hourly earnings of all private-sector employees. A key measure of wage growth and purchasing power.

job_openings.label: Job Openings
job_openings.subtitle: JOLTS Survey, Total Nonfarm
job_openings.description: Total nonfarm job openings from the Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey (JOLTS). A signal of labor demand.

quits_rate.label: Quit Rate
quits_rate.subtitle: JOLTS Survey, Total Nonfarm
quits_rate.description: Quits as a percent of total employment, total nonfarm, monthly, seasonally adjusted (JOLTS). A higher quit rate indicates worker confidence in finding new jobs.

median_weeks_unemployed.label: Median Weeks Unemployed
median_weeks_unemployed.subtitle: Median Duration of Unemployment
median_weeks_unemployed.description: Median number of weeks an unemployed person has been seeking work, monthly, seasonally adjusted.

mean_weeks_unemployed.label: Mean Weeks Unemployed
mean_weeks_unemployed.subtitle: Average Duration of Unemployment
mean_weeks_unemployed.description: Average number of weeks an unemployed person has been seeking work, monthly, seasonally adjusted.

income_20th.label: Income: 20th Percentile
income_20th.subtitle: Household Income, Lowest-Quintile Upper Limit
income_20th.description: The household income level that 20 percent of households fall below — the upper limit of the lowest quintile. Census ACS 1-year estimates, table B19080. Nominal dollars; use the Real toggle for inflation-adjusted values. No 2020 data.

income_80th.label: Income: 80th Percentile
income_80th.subtitle: Household Income, Fourth-Quintile Upper Limit
income_80th.description: The household income level that 80 percent of households fall below — the upper limit of the fourth quintile. Census ACS 1-year estimates, table B19080. Nominal dollars; use the Real toggle for inflation-adjusted values. No 2020 data.

cpi_all_items.label: Inflation (CPI)
cpi_all_items.subtitle: All Items, Seasonally Adjusted
cpi_all_items.description: CPI for all urban consumers, all items, seasonally adjusted — the broadest measure of the price level. Used here to compute real (inflation-adjusted) wages.

revolving_credit.label: Revolving Credit
revolving_credit.subtitle: Credit Cards & Other Revolving Debt
revolving_credit.description: Total revolving consumer credit outstanding (mostly credit cards), owned and securitized. Federal Reserve G.19 release.

student_loans.label: Student Loans
student_loans.subtitle: Student Loan Debt Outstanding
student_loans.description: Total student loan debt owned and securitized. Federal Reserve G.19 release.

auto_loans.label: Auto Loans
auto_loans.subtitle: Motor Vehicle Loan Debt Outstanding
auto_loans.description: Total motor vehicle loan debt owned and securitized. Federal Reserve G.19 release.

credit_card_delinquency.label: Credit Card Delinquency
credit_card_delinquency.subtitle: Delinquency Rate, All Commercial Banks
credit_card_delinquency.description: Share of credit card loan balances 30+ days delinquent at all commercial banks. Quarterly, seasonally adjusted.

consumer_loan_delinquency.label: Consumer Loan Delinquency
consumer_loan_delinquency.subtitle: Delinquency Rate, All Commercial Banks
consumer_loan_delinquency.description: Share of consumer loan balances 30+ days delinquent at all commercial banks. Quarterly, seasonally adjusted.

mortgage_delinquency.label: Mortgage Delinquency
mortgage_delinquency.subtitle: Single-Family Residential, All Commercial Banks
mortgage_delinquency.description: Share of single-family residential mortgage balances 30+ days delinquent at all commercial banks. Quarterly, seasonally adjusted.

debt_per_capita.label: Household Debt per Capita
debt_per_capita.subtitle: All Debt per Person with a Credit File
debt_per_capita.description: Total household debt (mortgage, auto, credit card, student loan, other) per person with a credit file. NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax, State-Level Household Debt Statistics — annual, each point is Q4.
debt_per_capita.source_note: NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax (annual, Q4)

studentloan_per_capita.label: Student Loan Debt per Capita
studentloan_per_capita.subtitle: Per Person with a Credit File, US
studentloan_per_capita.description: Student loan debt per person with a credit file, US. NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax — annual, each point is Q4. National comparison line for the state metric.
studentloan_per_capita.source_note: NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax (annual, Q4)

cc_delinquency_90.label: Credit Card Delinquency (90+)
cc_delinquency_90.subtitle: Share of Balance 90+ Days Late, US
cc_delinquency_90.description: Share of credit card balances 90 or more days delinquent, US. NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax — annual, each point is Q4. National comparison line for the state metric.
cc_delinquency_90.source_note: NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax (annual, Q4)

us_home_price_index.label: US Home Prices
us_home_price_index.subtitle: FHFA All-Transactions HPI, US
us_home_price_index.description: FHFA All-Transactions House Price Index for the United States, quarterly, not seasonally adjusted. Used as the national comparison line on state home-price charts.

us_median_income.label: US Median Income
us_median_income.subtitle: Real Median Household Income, US
us_median_income.description: Real (CPI-U-RS-adjusted) median household income in the United States, annual, from the Census Bureau. Used as the national comparison line on state income charts.

real_hourly_earnings.label: Real Hourly Earnings
real_hourly_earnings.subtitle: Inflation-Adjusted, Today's Dollars
real_hourly_earnings.description: Average hourly earnings of all private-sector employees, deflated by CPI-U (all items, seasonally adjusted) and expressed in the most recent month's dollars. Shows whether paychecks are keeping up with prices.

rent_hours.label: Rent in Hours of Work
rent_hours.subtitle: Hours at the Average Wage per Month's Rent
rent_hours.description: How many hours of work at the average private-sector hourly wage it takes to pay one month's market-rate rent (Zillow ZORI ÷ BLS average hourly earnings). Rising hours mean rent is outpacing pay.

metrics.label: Unemployment Rate
metrics.description: Unemployment rate, seasonally adjusted. BLS Local Area Unemployment Statistics.

metrics.label: Hourly Wages
metrics.description: Average hourly earnings of all private employees. BLS state Current Employment Statistics, not seasonally adjusted.

metrics.label: Home Prices
metrics.description: FHFA All-Transactions House Price Index, quarterly, not seasonally adjusted.

metrics.label: Median Household Income
metrics.description: Real (CPI-U-RS-adjusted) median household income, annual, from the Census Bureau Current Population Survey.

metrics.label: Rent (Market)
metrics.description: Typical market-rate asking rent. Zillow does not publish state ZORI, so this aggregates Zillow's county-level index using ACS renter-household weights; states where covered counties hold under half of renter households are omitted.

metrics.label: Rent in Hours of Work
metrics.source_label: Derived: Zillow ZORI ÷ BLS state hourly earnings
metrics.description: How many hours of work at the state's average private-sector hourly wage it takes to pay one month's market-rate rent. Derived from Zillow ZORI (renter-weighted county aggregation) and BLS state CES average hourly earnings.

metrics.label: Electricity Bill
metrics.description: Average monthly residential electricity bill: total residential revenue divided by residential customer count, from EIA Form 861M. Recent months are preliminary and revised later.

metrics.label: ACA Benchmark Premium
metrics.description: Average benchmark premium — the second-lowest-cost silver Marketplace plan for a 40-year-old, the plan ACA subsidies are pegged to. KFF analysis of Healthcare.gov and state rate filings.

metrics.label: Uninsured Rate
metrics.description: Share of the total population with no health insurance coverage. KFF Health Insurance Coverage of the Total Population. No 2020 data point (ACS did not release comparably).

metrics.label: Household Debt per Capita
metrics.source_label: NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax
metrics.description: Total household debt (mortgage, auto, credit card, student loan, other) per person with a credit file. NY Fed State-Level Household Debt Statistics; each point is Q4.

metrics.label: Student Loan Debt per Capita
metrics.source_label: NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax
metrics.description: Student loan debt per person with a credit file. NY Fed State-Level Household Debt Statistics; each point is Q4.

metrics.label: Credit Card Delinquency (90+)
metrics.source_label: NY Fed Consumer Credit Panel / Equifax
metrics.description: Share of credit card balances 90 or more days delinquent. NY Fed State-Level Household Debt Statistics; each point is Q4.

metrics.label: Income: 20th Percentile
metrics.description: The household income level that 20 percent of the state's households fall below (lowest-quintile upper limit). Nominal dollars; the Real toggle deflates by national CPI-U. No 2020 data.

metrics.label: Income: 80th Percentile
metrics.description: The household income level that 80 percent of the state's households fall below (fourth-quintile upper limit). Nominal dollars; the Real toggle deflates by national CPI-U. No 2020 data.

metrics.label: Rent Burden
metrics.description: Share of renter households paying 30 percent or more of household income on gross rent — the standard cost-burden threshold. Households where the ratio is not computed are excluded. No 2020 data.

annual.label: Medical Debt in Collections
annual.units: % of people with a credit record

annual.label: Any Debt in Collections
annual.units: % of people with a credit record
